business.title: WiMi announced a net income of RMB 347 million for 2025, a year-on-year increase of 235%
business.description: BEIJING, April 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. (Nasdaq: WIMI) ('WiMi' or the 'Company'), a leading hologram augmented reality ('AR') technology provider, today announced that it has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the Securities and Exchange Commission (the 'SEC').

business.title: WuXi Biologics Chengdu Microbial Commercial Manufacturing Site Achieves Structural Completion and Key Equipment Arrival
business.description: CHENGDU, China, April 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- WuXi Biologics (2269.HK), a leading global Contract Research, Development and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), today announced the structural completion and key equipment arrival at its microbial commercial manufacturing site in Chengdu, marking an important milestone as the company advances toward GMP release for production by the end of 2026.

business.title: Quhuo Announces Plan to Implement ADS Ratio Change
business.description: BEIJING, April 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Quhuo Limited (OTC: QHUOY) ('Quhuo' or the 'Company'), a leading gig economy platform focusing on local life services, today announced that it will change the ratio of its American Depositary Shares ('ADSs') to Class A ordinary shares (the 'ADS Ratio') from the current ADS Ratio of one ADS to nine hundred (900) Class A ordinary shares, par value US$0.0001 per share, of the Company (the 'Class A Ordinary Shares'), to a new ADS Ratio of one ADS to twenty-seven thousand (27,000) Class A Ordinary Shares.

business.title: Karan Gokani: Ozempic is coming for your restaurant plate
business.description: As drugs like Ozempic and Mounjaro reshape appetites worldwide, restaurants, supermarkets and fast food chains are pivoting to smaller portions, protein-heavy menus and flexible dining formats. With cheaper GLP1 generics set to flood India, how will a culture built on abundance cope?

ai.title: US stock market today: Why Dow Jones futures are falling while S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures surge higher? Here’s how global earnings, AI growth, and defense deals are reshaping US stock futures today
ai.description: US stock market today shows a sharp split. Dow Jones futures fall over 120 points. Nasdaq futures jump nearly 1%. S&P 500 futures edge higher. This divergence signals a powerful shift. Strong earnings drive momentum. Intel surges nearly 20% after beating estimates. AI growth accelerates demand. Global defense deals add confidence. Lockheed Martin secures a major F-16 contract. Meanwhile, global risks remain active. Oil-linked tensions and trade disruptions add pressure. The US stock market today reflects selective buying. Investors chase AI winners. They avoid weaker sectors. This market rewards precision, not broad exposure.
